description: The Yamatai people built many elevated buildings or buildings that were raised above the ground, with the buildings supported by six or more posts. A very sophisticated method called the mortise and tendon method was used to join the wooden beams, so experts think the people already had iron tools.
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]• Yamatai Structures −20% build time.
• Yamatai Structures −20% health.[/font]
